meta.source: src/data/seedData.ts (seedQuestions merged from all sprint data files)

verdictReason: Every questionId appears exactly once across all 19,043 questions in the entire curriculum, spanning all 6 grades (0–5) and 9 subjects. No questionId is shared between any two lessons or grades.
hierarchyRemapJustification: Per the governing rule: if questionId is globally unique across all questions, the exception applies and the current flat key schema (question:{questionId}) is valid and safe. Full hierarchy objectKey (language/grade/lesson/question) is NOT required.

idRange.note: ID range is intentionally non-contiguous — gaps exist due to curriculum-organized block allocation per grade/subject/sprint.

ttsKeySchema.schemaDecisionReason: Global uniqueness proven. Flat key is safe, unambiguous, and maps 1:1 to a physical audio file. Hierarchy is only required when a questionId could appear in multiple lessons/grades — which this audit proves does not happen.
ttsKeySchema.breakingChangeNote: Remap would require: (1) regenerate all 19,043 audio files from scratch or rename + re-upload, (2) update every runtime key resolution call in staticTtsManifest.ts and ttsAssetKeys.ts, (3) update all 4 pipeline scripts (export/generate/upload/test), (4) invalidate all existing cached R2 CDN URLs. Total risk: HIGH. Benefit: NONE (no uniqueness problem to solve).

runtimeKeyResolutionChain.step1_uiInvocation: PracticePage.tsx > speakQuestion() calls speakText(text, lang, { assetKey: buildQuestionAssetKey(question.id) })
runtimeKeyResolutionChain.step4_urlResolution: staticTtsManifest.ts > withResolvedAudioUrl() — for question keys: resolvedPath = 'audio/tts/assets/{profileId}/question/{questionId}.mp3'; in isWebProduction + R2 eligible: audioUrl = '{R2_PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/{resolvedPath}'
runtimeKeyResolutionChain.step5_playback: ttsRuntime.ts > speakText() uses the resolved audioUrl from manifest entry to play audio via HTMLAudioElement
runtimeKeyResolutionChain.conclusion: Each step is keyed exclusively by questionId (numeric). No lessonId or grade scoping in the runtime key path. This is correct and safe because questionIds are globally unique.

pipelineKeySchema.upload: upload-question-tts-to-r2.mjs: r2Key = item.r2Key = objectKey from catalog
pipelineKeySchema.r2TestVerified: r2-question-tts-asset-check.json: 40/40 samples pass (200, audio/mpeg, not HTML)

orphanAnalysis.orphanNote: All questions in seedQuestions have a valid lessonId. The runtime getLessonQuestions() filters by q.lessonId === lessonId, so no orphan question can ever be served in practice.

evidence.description: R2 CDN sanity check: all sampled question audio file URLs return 200 audio/mpeg
Local file validation: all vi-v1 question mp3 pass MP3 magic and size checks
Local file validation: all en-v1 question mp3 pass MP3 magic and size checks
